positive: A mystical, detailed silhouette of a nocturnal forest scene featuring glowing bioluminescent flora, crescent moon arches, and various ethereal woodland creatures like owls and stylized deer. Highly detailed, vector art quality, perfect print-on-demand illustration, symmetrical composition, deep depth of field, midnight hour.
